websocket_server_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual websocket_server_config_t(3)

NAME

websocket_server_config_t - WebSocket server configuration.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/server.h>

Data Fields


int port
Port to listen on. websocket_client_handler_fn client_handler
Handler for new connections. void * user_data
User data passed to handlers. const char * tls_cert_path
TLS certificate file path (optional, for wss://). const char * tls_key_path
TLS private key file path (optional, for wss://).

Detailed Description

WebSocket server configuration.
